historical_facts.claim: Batch allows multiple transactions to be bundled and processed together.
historical_facts.quote_or_summary: Known Amendments describes Batch as bundled transaction processing.

historical_facts.claim: Batch was disabled in v3.1.1 due to a bug and marked obsolete.
historical_facts.quote_or_summary: Known Amendments warning says Batch was disabled due to a bug and will be replaced.

safe_route_label.label: REJECT
safe_route_label.notes: Known Amendments says Batch was disabled in v3.1.1 due to a bug.

short_description: Batch transaction amendment disabled due to a bug.

sources.summary: XRPL validators vote on amendments; more than 80% support must hold for two weeks, and servers without enabled amendment code become amendment-blocked.
XRPL's public known-amendments inventory, including status, default vote, amendment IDs, and descriptions.

technical_change: Bundles multiple transactions for all-or-nothing processing.
